Video.summary: Live from Miami Beach on April 26, 2018, Karate Combat: Inception is the first event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Held as a private, invite-only spectacle, this video stream will show all of the key fighters, as it happens. Featured on the Main Card: Elhadji "Black Magic" Ndour of the United States versus Andras “The Titan” Virag, a game contender from Hungary. The co-main event features Dionicio Gustavo of the Dominican Republic versus France's Alexandre Bouderbane in a key contest. Other fighters include Adham Sabry of the USA, Spyros Margaritopoulos of Greece, and Joshua Quayhagen from the USA.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: INCEPTION
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: INCEPTION

Image.alt: KARATE COMBAT: INCEPTION
KARATE COMBAT: INCEPTION
KARATE COMBAT: INCEPTION

Video.summary: Every athlete has their own unique way to be the best. We focus on the details of their training and why they think they have been successful. Gain insight on the featured athlete from their coaches and training partners - as well as the athlete themselves - about preparing for their sport. What do they bring to the sport as individuals - and what do they gain by being at the top of their game? Featuring Cody Clarke
Video.grandparentTitle: Fighter Profile: Cody Clarke
Video.title: Fighter Profile: Cody Clarke

Image.alt: Fighter Profile: Cody Clarke
Fighter Profile: Cody Clarke
Fighter Profile: Cody Clarke

Video.summary: Hard Knocks Fighting: HK46 filmado en el Markin Macphail Center en Calgary. Los luchadores profesionales y aficionados de toda América del Norte luchan en la jaula. Phil Towler vs. Chris Lee Byrne, Mike O'Neill vs. Alexi Argyriou.
Video.grandparentTitle: HK 46 - Episodio 4
Video.title: HK 46 - Episodio 4

Image.alt: HK 46 - Episodio 4
HK 46 - Episodio 4
HK 46 - Episodio 4

Video.summary: Hard Knocks 47 kicks off with with a Featherweight Title Fight in the Amateur Division as striker Joe ""Flash"" Mapanda challenges the reigning champion Justin Basra. This is followed by an Amateur Lightweight Title Fight as Tom ""The Greek Warrior"" Theocharis takes on Alex Martinez. Wrapping up this episode is a pro bout between wrestler TJ Laramie and Luke Noel. You do not want to miss it!
Video.grandparentTitle: Fight Vault - HK47 - Episode 1
Video.title: Fight Vault - HK47 - Episode 1

Image.alt: Fight Vault - HK47 - Episode 1
Fight Vault - HK47 - Episode 1

Video.summary: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.
Video.grandparentTitle: Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 02
Video.title: Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 02

Image.alt: Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 02
Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 02
Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 02

Video.summary: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Nadege Ait-Ibrahim v. Ana Luiza Ferreira.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: HOLLYWOOD - Nadege Ait-Ibrahim v. Ana Luiza Ferreira

Video.summary: Owen Carr has been involved in MMA for over 25 years, after being introduced to the sport at a very young age. He has learned persistence and has a strong belief in staying true to himself. He consistantly trains with 30 guys on the mat, and feels he is always well prepared. Today he shares some endurance tips that help him pace himself and stay focused in his matches.
Video.grandparentTitle: Out of the Cage - Owen Carr
Video.title: Out of the Cage - Owen Carr

Image.alt: Out of the Cage - Owen Carr
Out of the Cage - Owen Carr
Out of the Cage - Owen Carr
